metadata.description: Name of the environment (used to generate resource names)
Primary Azure region for all resources
Principal ID of the user running azd provision (for local testing RBAC)
Set to false to skip creating a gpt-4.1 deployment when quota is exhausted
Override endpoint for quality evaluators when reusing an existing deployment. Leave blank to use the provisioned AI Services account.
Override deployment name when reusing an existing deployment.
Timestamp injected at provision time — forces the workbook resource to update on every azd provision.

columns.name: TimeGenerated
columns.description: UTC timestamp the eval row was written

columns.name: ResourceGroup_s
columns.description: Resource group of the Foundry project

columns.name: FoundryProjectId_s
columns.description: Full ARM resource ID of the Foundry project (hub/workspace)

columns.name: TargetName_s
columns.description: Deployment name, agent name, or dataset name

columns.name: EvalPackVersion_s
columns.description: Version of the baseline eval pack executed

columns.name: EvalRunId_s
columns.description: Unique GUID for this eval run batch

columns.name: EvalDatasetPath_s
columns.description: Path/URI of the test dataset used

columns.name: Threshold_d
columns.description: Minimum passing score for this evaluator

columns.name: ErrorMessage_s
columns.description: Non-empty if the evaluator raised an exception

columns.name: RawOutput_s
columns.description: JSON-serialized raw evaluator output (truncated to 8 KB)

metadata.description: Name of the Azure AI Services account (Foundry hub)
Name of the AI Foundry project (child of the account)
Name of the gpt-4.1 deployment (used as AZURE_OPENAI_DEPLOYMENT)
Capacity in thousands of tokens per minute for the Standard (regional) deployment
Set to false to skip creating a new GPT deployment (use when quota is exhausted)

parameters.azureOpenAiEndpoint: [if(not(empty(parameters('existingOpenAiEndpoint'))), createObject('value', parameters('existingOpenAiEndpoint')), createObject('value', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}{1}', variables('abbrs').resourcesResourceGroups, parameters('environmentName'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'foundry'), '2025-04-01').outputs.aiServicesEndpoint.value))]
parameters.azureOpenAiDeployment: [if(not(empty(parameters('existingOpenAiDeployment'))), createObject('value', parameters('existingOpenAiDeployment')), createObject('value', reference(extensionResourceId(format('/subscriptions/{0}/resourceGroups/{1}', subscription().subscriptionId, format('{0}{1}', variables('abbrs').resourcesResourceGroups, parameters('environmentName'))), 'Microsoft.Resources/deployments', 'foundry'), '2025-04-01').outputs.gptDeploymentName.value))]

metadata.description: Principal ID of the user running azd provision (for local testing RBAC)
